name: Fat-Free Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch cake pan with cooking spray.
2. Add brown sugar, corn syrup, and lemon juice; stir to combine.
3. Place in oven preheated to 350°F for 3 minutes.
4. Arrange pineapple rings and cherries in the pan; set aside.
5. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt.
6. In a medium bowl, stir sugar and skim milk until sugar is almost dissolved.
7. Add egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla; stir until blended.
8. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture, stirring until smooth.
9. Pour into the pan.
10. Bake in oven preheated to 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Immediately loosen the edge of the cake with a spatula and invert onto a serving plate.
12. Remove the pan.
Each serving provides: 200 Calories, 2 g protein, 47 g carbohydrate, 0 mg cholesterol, 160 mg sodium
